mapper.select: SELECT CAST(post_id AS VARCHAR) AS id, title, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS date FROM common_post WHERE menu_key = 'PINNABLE' AND template_code = 'PINNABLE' AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT CAST(cp.post_id AS VARCHAR) AS id, cp.title, CAST((SELECT cf.file_id FROM com_file cf WHERE cf.pgm_id = 'post' AND cf.ref_id = CAST(cp.post_id AS VARCHAR) AND cf.is_deleted = FALSE AND cf.file_usage = 'attachment' ORDER BY cf.file_id ASC LIMIT 1) AS VARCHAR) AS imageUrl, cp.popup_link_url AS linkUrl FROM common_post cp WHERE cp.menu_key = 'BANNER' AND cp.template_code = 'SLIDE' AND cp.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND cp.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY cp.order_no ASC LIMIT 5

SELECT CAST(cp.post_id AS VARCHAR) AS id, cp.title, CAST((SELECT cf.file_id FROM com_file cf WHERE cf.pgm_id = 'post' AND cf.ref_id = CAST(cp.post_id AS VARCHAR) AND cf.is_deleted = FALSE AND cf.file_usage = 'attachment' ORDER BY cf.file_id ASC LIMIT 1) AS VARCHAR) AS imageUrl, cp.popup_link_url AS linkUrl, TO_CHAR(cp.popup_start_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS startDt, TO_CHAR(cp.popup_end_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS endDt, cp.popup_dismiss_option AS dismissOption FROM common_post cp WHERE cp.menu_key = 'BANNER' AND cp.template_code = 'POPUP' AND cp.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND cp.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY cp.order_no ASC LIMIT 5

SELECT CAST(post_id AS VARCHAR) AS id, title, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS date FROM common_post WHERE menu_key = 'SINGLE_IMAGE' AND template_code = 'SINGLE_IMAGE' AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT CAST(cp.post_id AS VARCHAR) AS id, cp.title, CAST((SELECT cf.file_id FROM com_file cf WHERE cf.pgm_id = 'post' AND cf.ref_id = CAST(cp.post_id AS VARCHAR) AND cf.is_deleted = FALSE AND cf.file_usage = 'attachment' ORDER BY cf.file_id ASC LIMIT 1) AS VARCHAR) AS imageUrl, TO_CHAR(cp.created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS date, cp.content_html AS contentHtml FROM common_post cp WHERE cp.menu_key = 'GALLERY' AND cp.template_code = 'GALLERY' AND cp.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND cp.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY cp.created_at DESC LIMIT 6
